answers.description: A CLI tool for transforming YouTube video content into readable guides
answers.problem_statement: Users desire a nice, structured and readable guide from a YouTube tutorial video (e.g. handstand tutorial, fingerstyle guitar notes) with clear images, screenshots and text of each step for reference during practice
answers.target_users: Learners who watch tutorial videos and want structured reference documents, and content consumers who want offline, readable versions of YouTube guides
answers.key_goals: Turn a YouTube training tutorial, guitar song notes or other video into a clear and structured step-by-step document using clear images, screenshots and text of each step
answers.tdd_strictness: Flexible - tests recommended for complex logic
